title: Wild Grass English Translation Preface
author: Lu Xun
evidence_summary: Frames the prose poems of Wild Grass as oblique responses to a time when direct speech was difficult, linking satire, political pressure, and the bleak but resistant emotional register of the collection.
notes: Useful for deriving the persona's tolerance for ambiguity, indirect rhetoric, and resistance inside darkness without overclaiming an exact year not stated on the page body.
